payload.description: First-ever Zero-Emission 40-foot buses in NYCT history unveiled. Two battery-electric buses entered service for customers in Queens and Brooklyn out of the Grand Avenue Depot.

records.raw_text: MTA Chair & CEO Janno Lieber is joined by Rep. Nydia Velázquez, NYPA President & CEO Justin Driscoll, Queens Borough President Donovan Richards, and NYCT President Richard Davey at the Grand Avenue Depot, on Tuesday, May 14, to announce an additional 60 all-electric buses joining NYCT's current fleet.

description: Deployment of 60 standard 40-foot battery-electric buses (BEBs) operating out of four depots. Includes first agency-owned standard 40-foot electric buses, first in-depot overhead pantograph chargers, first partnership with NY Power Authority for charger installation.
